title: Nike UK launches 'Infinite Sweat' eco-engineered running sets at high premium
snippet: Nike's London outlets are rolling out carbon-neutral functional training shirts using recycled ocean plastics, accompanied by heavy influencer endorsements.

classification.summary: Nike UK has launched eco-engineered running sets made from recycled ocean plastics, targeting sustainability and featuring influencer endorsements. This high-premium product release positions Nike as a leader in sustainable activewear, potentially disrupting market dynamics.
